title: linaria reflexa var. agglutinans
intro: Linaria reflexa var. agglutinans, also known as Toadflax or Self-heal, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The health benefits of Linaria reflexa var. agglutinans include promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system, which can help to prevent illnesses and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health issues, and it is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
